path.id: Unified disjointed legacy systems into a single automated data flow, reducing reporting time by 80%.
Real-time bi-directional sync across 4 global storefronts and central ERP, eliminating stockouts.
Custom engine that automatically categorizes, prioritizes, and assigns incoming requests based on team load.
Replaced 40 hours of manual Excel work per month with a scheduled, error-free PDF/Web report generation script.
Complex logic routing high-value leads to senior reps within 5 seconds, triggering multi-channel alerts.
Unified bot handling Tier-1 queries across WhatsApp, Web, and Email with a 75% resolution rate.
